items.raw_excerpt: "A mate rang me up and said, 'Do you want to have a go?'" That's all it took to get Jake Callagan in the saddle for the Jundah Camel races. The novice camel jockey took to it well, with a swag of blue, red and green ribbons to take home.
items.summary_en: Jake Callagan got a call from a mate asking if he wanted to try camel racing. He said yes and rode well at the Jundah Camel races, winning blue, red and green ribbons.
items.summary_ko: 친구의 전화 한 통으로 제이크 캘러건이 준다 낙타 경주에 도전했습니다. 첫 출전임에도 불구하고 파란색, 빨간색, 초록색 리본을 따며 선전했습니다.
items.title_en: A first-time camel jockey takes home ribbons at an outback race
items.title_ko: 처음 탄 낙타 경주에서 리본을 휩쓴 아웃백의 신예 기수
items.title_original: Jake answers the call and saddles up for ride of a lifetime

items.raw_excerpt: On Saturday 20 June 2026, Brussels-based international solidarity stakeholders gathered for the Soliris Village. This event provided a valuable opportunity to present the general public with tangible international solidarity initiatives currently deployed across the Brussels-Capital Region.
items.summary_en: Brussels held the Soliris Village event on June 20, 2026. The gathering showed local international solidarity projects to the general public. It took place across the Brussels-Capital Region.
items.summary_ko: 브뤼셀에서 2026년 6월 20일 솔리리스 빌리지 행사가 열렸다. 이 자리에서는 브뤼셀 수도권에서 진행 중인 국제연대 활동을 일반 대중에게 소개했다.
items.title_en: Brussels hosts Soliris Village for international solidarity
items.title_ko: 브뤼셀에서 솔리리스 빌리지 국제연대 행사 열려
items.title_original: A Soliris Village in the centre of Brussels: international solidarity in action - be.brussels

items.raw_excerpt: You don't have to travel far to find one of Canada's "best" places to live. This Ontario town has been named among the top places to call home in the country, and it offers stunning lakes and quaint streets.
items.summary_en: A small town in Ontario's Muskoka region has been named among Canada's best places to live. The community offers sparkling lakes and charming streets close to home.
items.summary_ko: 온타리오 머스코카 지역의 작은 마을이 캐나다에서 가장 살기 좋은 곳 중 하나로 꼽혔다. 이 마을은 반짝이는 호수와 아늑한 거리를 자랑한다.
items.title_en: Little Ontario town named one of Canada's best places to live
items.title_ko: 온타리오의 작은 마을, 캐나다 최고 거주지 중 하나로 선정
items.title_original: This little Ontario town tucked amidst sparkling lakes is one of Canada's best spots to live - Narcity

items.raw_excerpt: The $6 million property offers a rare opportunity to own a piece of New England history.
items.summary_en: A tiny village in Maine is listed for $6 million. The property covers multiple buildings and lets the buyer own a rare piece of New England history.
items.summary_ko: 메인주의 한 작은 마을이 600만 달러에 시장에 나왔다. 여러 건물을 포함한 이 부지는 뉴잉글랜드 역사의 한 조각을 통째로 소유할 수 있는 드문 기회를 제공한다.
items.title_en: Maine village for sale for $6 million
items.title_original: Maine village for sale for $6 million - WCVB
